brief_title: A Study of INCMGA00012 in Squamous Carcinoma of the Anal Canal Following Platinum-Based Chemotherapy (POD1UM-202)
official_title: A Phase 2 Study of INCMGA00012 in Participants With Squamous Carcinoma of the Anal Canal Who Have Progressed Following Platinum-Based Chemotherapy (POD1UM-202)

pmids.citation: Rao S, Anandappa G, Capdevila J, Dahan L, Evesque L, Kim S, Saunders MP, Gilbert DC, Jensen LH, Samalin E, Spindler KL, Tamberi S, Demols A, Guren MG, Arnold D, Fakih M, Kayyal T, Cornfeld M, Tian C, Catlett M, Smith M, Spano JP. A phase II study of retifanlimab (INCMGA00012) in patients with squamous carcinoma of the anal canal who have progressed following platinum-based chemotherapy (POD1UM-202). ESMO Open. 2022 Aug;7(4):100529. doi: 10.1016/j.esmoop.2022.100529. Epub 2022 Jul 8.

outcomes.title: Objective Response Rate (ORR)
outcomes.description: ORR was defined as the percentage of participants with a best overall response of complete response (CR) or partial response (PR), per Response Evaluation Criteria in Solid Tumors (RECIST) version 1.1 (v1.1), as assessed by independent central radiographic (ICR) review, at any post-Baseline visit un

outcomes.title: Duration of Response (DOR)
outcomes.description: DOR was defined as the time from an initial objective response (CR or PR) per RECIST v1.1 until the first observation of documented disease progression (PD), as determined by ICR, or death due to any cause. CR: disappearance of all target and non-target lesions and no appearance of any new lesions.

outcomes.title: Disease Control Rate (DCR)
outcomes.description: DCR was defined as the percentage of participants with a confirmed overall response of CR, PR, or stable disease (SD), per RECIST v1.1, at any post-baseline visit until the first progressive disease (PD) or new anti-cancer therapy. CR: disappearance of all target and non-target lesions and no appear

outcomes.title: Progression-free Survival (PFS)
outcomes.description: According to RECIST 1.1, PFS was defined as the length of time from the initial infusion of study drug until the earliest date of disease progression, as determined by ICR, or death due to any cause, if occurring sooner than progression.

outcomes.title: Overall Survival
outcomes.description: Overall survival was defined as the time in months between the first dose date (Day 1) and the date of death due to any cause.

outcomes.title: Number of Participants With Treatment-emergent Adverse Events (TEAEs)
outcomes.description: An adverse event (AE) was defined as any untoward medical occurrence associated with the use of a drug in humans, whether or not considered drug-related. An AE could have been any unfavorable and unintended sign (including an abnormal laboratory finding), symptom, or disease (new or exacerbated) tem

outcomes.title: Cmax of Retifanlimab
outcomes.description: Cmax was defined as the maximum observed plasma concentration.

outcomes.title: Tmax of Retifanlimab
outcomes.description: tmax was defined as the time to the maximum concentration.

outcomes.title: Cmin of Retifanlimab
outcomes.description: Cmin was defined as the minimum observed plasma concentration over the dose interval.

outcomes.title: AUC0-t of Retifanlimab
outcomes.description: AUC0-t was defined as the area under the plasma concentration-time curve from time = 0 to the last measurable concentration at time = t.
